holdings.infoBox: IWO is an equity ETF with a total of 1087 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 3.48%, Credo Technology Group Holding at 2.25%, Sterling Infrastructure at 1.40%, Fabrinet at 1.18%, and IonQ, Inc. at 1.06%.

overview.description: The iShares Russell 2000 Growth ETF (IWO) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 Growth index. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap growth stocks, selected from those ranked 1001-3000 by market-cap based on growth factors. IWO was launched on Jul 24, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: ETFs that track meme stocks have been surging, as 'animal spirits' return to markets
data.text: Meme stocks have been on the rise recently as November's market rally brings a wave of bullishness.  A handful of meme-stock ETFs have beat the S&P 500 over the last trading week.
